requirement.statement: 楹사퍨 SHALL prevent `actor.idle.before` hooks from running as idle continuation while any wake-capable actor mailbox has pending work.

case.given: An actor has pending `control`, `toolResult`, `asyncCompletion`, `childDone`, `memberCoordination`, `humanInput`, `memberChatInbox`, or `heartbeat` entries
case.then: The producer SHALL treat the actor as non-idle
The dispatch SHALL stop before goal continuation or other idle effects are produced

case.given: An idle hook dispatch is skipped because lifecycle state is no longer current
case.then: The diagnostic SHOULD include the pending mailbox kinds that made the actor non-idle
Repeated equivalent diagnostics SHOULD be throttled or coalesced to avoid flooding orchestration history

case.given: The background watchdog observes a ready fiber or pending wake mailbox work
case.then: The runtime SHALL attempt scheduler drain before producing lower-priority idle continuation effects
